transcript: आपका पेंडिंग बिल कब क्लियर हो रहा है ड्यू डेट क्रॉस हो चुकी है भाई मैं अभी पे नहीं कर सकता मेरा बजट नहीं है और सैलरी भी डिले हो गई है सर पेनल्टी लग जाएगी अगर आज पेमेंट नहीं किया तो लग जाने दो पेनल्टी मेरे पास अभी पैसा नहीं है मैं नेक्स्ट वीक दे देखूँगा
summary: The agent called the customer regarding an overdue bill, informing them that the due date had passed and a penalty would be applied if payment wasn't made today. The customer stated they could not pay due to budget constraints and a delayed salary, indicating they would look into it next week. The customer accepted the penalty.

sop_validation.explanation: The agent clearly stated the problem (pending bill, due date crossed, penalty). However, there was no greeting, no identification of the agent or customer, no solution offered beyond stating the penalty, and no proper closing farewell.
